item.title: 'Sell Bitcoin Now' – Crypto Critic Peter Schiff Warns Of BTC's Price Falling To $20,000
item.description: In a post on X, Peter Schiff stated that if Bitcoin’s price dips below $50,000, it is “highly likely” to keep falling until it hits $20,000.

item.title: Google Gemini Pro 3.1: Alphabet Updates Its Benchmark AI, Analysis Says It Undercuts OpenAI's ChatGPT, Anthropic's Claude On Cost
item.description: Google’s Gemini 3, released in November, drew widespread praise and gave a notable lift to the company’s financial performance.

item.title: CVNA Stock Still Presents 32% Upside For RBC Analyst, Even As Retail Gets More Bearish After Q4 Profit Miss
item.description: Retail traders are turning bearish on Carvana as signs of growth are becoming less clear.

item.title: Changpeng ‘CZ’ Zhao Says ‘Crypto Never Needed A Bailout, Never Will,’ In Reponse To Senator Warren’s No-Rescue Peal To Fed
item.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren named the Binance co-founder alongside Strategy’s Michael Saylor, Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong and President Donald Trump in ...

item.title: ‘Avatar’ Director James Cameron Calls Netflix-WBD Disastrous, Bats For Paramount Takeover
item.description: Observers worry Netflix may cut back on how many Warner Bros. movies go to theaters and instead release more of them on its streaming platform first.
